name: detector respects CLAUDE_TDD_PRO_WORKDIR env to scan files relative to a different directory
command: mkdir -p elsewhere && echo 'const x: any = 1;' > elsewhere/a.ts && CLAUDE_TDD_PRO_WORKDIR="$PWD/elsewhere" bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --paths "*.ts" 2>out.json; grep -E '"filename":"a\.ts"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2 || { echo FAIL 1>&2; exit 2; }; exit 1
